Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}...Oh, but I guess we're not going to Tartarus tonight, huh? Kirijo-senpai said she didn't think everyone would be back in time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...Um, I'm not boring you, am I? I know this is a special night you're choosing to spend with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Oh, sorry, was that rude? I don't know what I'm saying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This is the first time I've ever done this for Christmas, so I think I'm just nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But really, I'm so happy to spend this night with you. I'll never forget it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Thank you for everything. Honestly, I feel like I rely on you so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And not just because you're our leader. I mean for me, personally, because I...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Ahhh, um, I meant— S-Sorry about that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}So, what should we do after this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Fuuka until night fell.[n]{f 1 1}
